elections.title: Assembly At-Large Election Cycle-4
elections.summary: Election of twelve at-large Assembly members for the four-year cycle-4 term.

elections.title: District 7 Special Election
elections.summary: Special election to fill the District 7 vacancy caused by resignation.

elections.title: Constitutional Council Retention Vote
elections.summary: Retention vote for one expiring Constitutional Council seat under staggered-terms rules.

referendums.title: Digital Sovereignty Charter Amendment: Cross-Network Citizenship Recognition
referendums.summary: Proposed amendment to Article 4 recognizing valid citizenship credentials from compatible digital polities under the Inter-Polity Recognition Protocol.

referendums.title: Open-Source Infrastructure Mandate Ratification
referendums.summary: Ratification of the policy requiring open-source disclosure of core protocol code for infrastructure contracts exceeding 10,000 AETH tokens.

petitions.title: Public Node Minimum Uptime Standard
petitions.summary: Petition to establish 99.95% uptime SLA for public nodes receiving municipal funding.

petitions.title: Regional Ambassador Program Expansion
petitions.summary: Petition to expand the ambassador program to six additional regions under the Digital Service Corps.

petitions.title: Repeal of Bandwidth Fee Surcharge
petitions.summary: Petition to repeal the 2% surcharge on commercial bandwidth contracts. Failed signature threshold.
